report_name: Phishing Campaign Abuses Legitimate SimpleHelp RMM Tool via Fake DHL 'Shipment Arrived' Emails

attack_patterns.name: Spearphishing Attachment
attack_patterns.description: The attack begins with a phishing email impersonating DHL, containing a malicious PDF attachment (e.g., AWB-Doc0921.pdf).

attack_patterns.name: Malicious File
attack_patterns.description: Users are tricked into clicking a button within a PDF, which downloads and executes a malicious Windows screensaver (.scr) file disguised as a document viewer.

attack_patterns.name: Ingress Tool Transfer
attack_patterns.description: A malicious screensaver file, which is an installer for the SimpleHelp RMM tool, is downloaded from a compromised domain onto the victim's machine.

attack_patterns.name: Remote Access Software
attack_patterns.description: The legitimate SimpleHelp RMM tool is installed and pre-configured to connect to an attacker-controlled server, providing persistent remote access to the victim's network.

tools.name: SimpleHelp
tools.description: A legitimate remote monitoring and management (RMM) tool abused by attackers. A pre-configured installer is delivered via phishing to establish a persistent backdoor into the victim's network.

campaigns.name: DHL SimpleHelp Phishing Campaign
campaigns.description: An ongoing phishing campaign that impersonates DHL to deliver a malicious installer for the SimpleHelp RMM tool, aiming to gain persistent remote access to organizations in the logistics and industrial supply sectors.

identities.name: DHL
identities.description: The shipping company DHL was impersonated in phishing emails to lend legitimacy to the attack and lure victims into opening malicious attachments.

infrastructure.name: SimpleHelp C2 Server
infrastructure.description: An attacker-controlled server to which the malicious SimpleHelp client connects, providing the threat actors with remote access and control over the compromised system.

infrastructure.name: Payload Hosting Server
infrastructure.description: A compromised website of a Vietnamese logistics company used to host the malicious .scr file for download by victims.

indicators.name: SimpleHelp Payload Hosting Domain
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: SimpleHelp Payload Hosting Domain DNS Query
id: 2b1a9c8d-e3f4-4a5b-8c6d-7e8f9a0b1c2d
status: experimental
description: Detects DNS queries to a compromised domain known to host malicious SimpleHelp installers.
references:
  - https://www.malwarebytes.com/blog/news/2026/04/your-shipment-has-arrived-email-hides-remote-access-software
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-17
tags:
  - attack.t1105
level: high
logsource:
  category: dns_query
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    QueryName|contains:
      - 'longhungphatlogistics.vn'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects network connections to a compromised Vietnamese logistics domain used to host the malicious .scr payload.

indicators.name: Unauthorized SimpleHelp Execution
indicators.pattern:
title: Unauthorized SimpleHelp RMM Tool Execution
id: 9f8e7d6c-5b4a-4c3d-8e7f-6a5b4c3d2e1f
status: experimental
description: Detects the execution of SimpleHelp, a legitimate RMM tool that is being abused in phishing campaigns to gain backdoor access. Monitor for installations in environments where this tool is not authorized.
references:
  - https://www.malwarebytes.com/blog/news/2026/04/your-shipment-has-arrived-email-hides-remote-access-software
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-17
tags:
  - attack.t1219
level: medium
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate use of SimpleHelp by IT administrators.
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\SimpleHelp.exe'
    Description|contains:
      - 'SimpleHelp Remote Support'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the execution of the SimpleHelp RMM tool, which is abused in this campaign for persistent remote access. This may be a false positive in environments where SimpleHelp is used legitimately.
